title: Independent stratified accuracy + provenance audit of CIViC slice (>=98%)
context: The project's definition of done requires an independent accuracy audit achieving >=98% verification rate. The auditor must be independent of the extractor to avoid self-grading bias. The audit covers a stratified sample of assertions from the CIViC data slice, checking that each assertion matches the cited CIViC source record and that no evidence re-grading occurred. Mis-citations block sign-off until corrected.
objective: Conduct an independent stratified accuracy and provenance audit of the CIViC graph slice. Check a stratified sample (>=200 assertions or whole release, strata by edge type and evidence level) against cited CIViC records, confirm >=98% verification, and confirm no evidence re-grading occurred.
acceptanceCriteria: A stratified sample of >=200 assertions (or the whole release if smaller) is audited, with strata by edge type and evidence level.
>=98% of sampled assertions verify against the cited CIViC source record.
Auditor confirms no evidence re-grading occurred (levels match CIViC source verbatim).
Auditor is independent of the CIViC ETL implementer (no self-grading).
Any mis-citations found are reported and block sign-off until the ETL is corrected.
Audit report published as docs/qa/civic-audit-report.md with methodology, sample design, findings, and sign-off.
output: docs/qa/civic-audit-report.md with methodology, stratified sample design, per-stratum results, overall accuracy rate, and independent auditor sign-off.
